info.title: Prood Commerce API
info.description: Multi-tenant commerce HTTP API. Authenticate with Agent Auth (Bearer JWT + capability grants), `x-api-key` (org + scopes in key metadata), a Better Auth session cookie (dashboard), or resolve the tenant from the request `Host`. Agent discovery: `/.well-known/agent-configuration`.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: Organization-scoped API key with scope metadata.

bearerAuth.description: Agent Auth JWT with capability grants.

storefrontHost.name: x-storefront-host
storefrontHost.description: Storefront tenant host for storefront-scoped calls.

checkoutSecret.name: x-checkout-secret
checkoutSecret.description: Shared secret used by the checkout service for payment webhook forwarding.

stripeSignature.name: stripe-signature
stripeSignature.description: Stripe webhook signature for direct Stripe callbacks.
